prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to the UK digital identity framework, which is managed by the Office for Digital Identities and Attributes (OfDIA) under a UK government department. While it mentions UK-wide applicability, Scotland has its own separate legal framework for data and identity matters, making this report primarily relevant to England, Wales, and Northern Ireland.
